description: Smoke iter1 (signal isolation): XGBoost on 3 transfer-mode features (n_transferred, transfer_overlap_ratio, is_no_transfer) derived from parcel_ids vs transferred_parcel_ids set arithmetic. Tests whether the 32% no_transfer / 66% full_match / 1.5% partial split (median 80k vs 118k) predicts in isolation. Baseline-3-style.
